article_title: White House Orders Nuclear Reactors in Orbit by 2028 and on the Moon by 2030 Under New Space Nuclear Initiative

content_preview.title: White House Orders Nuclear Reactors in Orbit by 2028 and on the Moon by 2030 Under New Space Nuclear Initiative
content_preview.summary: The White House Office of Science and Technology Policy released guidance on April 14, 2026, directing NASA and the Pentagon to run parallel reactor design competitions aimed at demonstrating space fission power as early as 2028.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

The White House Office of Science and Technology Policy (OSTP) on April 14 released the National Initiative for American Space Nuclear Power, formal interagency guidance that directs NASA, the Department of Defense, and the Department of Energy to accelerate the development and deployment of fission reactors in orbit and on the lunar surface. The initiative implements a December 2025 executive order on space superiority and sets launch targets as early as 2028 for an interplanetary ...
